title: Wooden Garden Trug - Hand-Jointed Sussex Style
description: A beautifully hand-jointed wooden garden trug in the traditional Sussex style. Crafted from sweet chestnut slats with a steam-bent willow frame and handle. Approximately 16 inches long and 9 inches deep, sized generously for carrying cut flowers, herbs, or harvested vegetables. Finished with raw linseed oil to protect the wood. Each trug shows the natural color variation of the chestnut. An ideal gift for any serious gardener.
tags: garden trug,wooden trug,Sussex trug,handmade trug,gardening gift,chestnut wood,New England craft

title: Large Wooden Garden Trug - Deep Harvest Basket
description: A deep, generous garden trug for serious harvesting. Hand-jointed from air-dried ash slats with a sturdy bentwood handle. Approximately 20 inches long and 11 inches deep — roomy enough for a full armload of garden produce or cutting flowers. Treated with food-safe mineral oil. Sits flat on the potting bench. A workhorse trug that will last decades with minimal care.
tags: garden trug,harvest basket,large trug,ash wood,handmade,gardening,New England

title: Monogrammed Garden Trug - Personalized with Initial
description: Our classic Sussex-style wooden trug with a single initial hand-burned into the handle using a fine pyrography tip. A deeply personal gift for any devoted gardener. Made from sweet chestnut slats with willow frame. Approximately 16 inches long. Specify the initial you would like in the personalization field at checkout. Treated with linseed oil. A gift they will use every growing season.
tags: monogrammed trug,personalized garden trug,initial trug,garden gift,pyrography,handmade,gardening

title: Monogrammed Garden Trowel - Hardwood Handle with Burned Initial
description: A sturdy stainless-steel trowel with a smooth hardwood handle personalized with a pyrography-burned initial. Comfortable in the hand and balanced for precision planting. Handle is approximately 5 inches, total length 12 inches. Specify your initial at checkout. Makes a wonderful gift for a dedicated gardener. Presented in a simple kraft paper sleeve tied with garden twine.
tags: monogrammed trowel,personalized garden tool,initial trowel,gardening gift,handmade,pyrography,stainless trowel

title: Monogrammed Garden Fork Set - Trowel & Fork with Matching Initials
description: A matching set of stainless-steel trowel and hand fork, both with hardwood handles personalized with the same burned initial. Ideal as a unified garden gift. Each tool is approximately 12 inches total length with a 5-inch handle. Specify your initial at checkout. The set arrives wrapped in kraft paper with a sprig of dried lavender.
tags: monogrammed garden tools,personalized garden set,trowel and fork,gardening gift,hardwood handle,initial,handmade gift

title: Hand-Thrown Pottery Mug - Stoneware with Blue-Grey Glaze
description: A hand-thrown stoneware mug in a quiet blue-grey celadon glaze with a warm cream interior. Approximately 12 oz capacity. Wheel-thrown and kiln-fired to cone 6 for durability. Comfortable C-handle. Dishwasher and microwave safe. Each mug is individual — glaze pooling and slight variations make yours one of a kind. Perfect for morning tea or a slow cup of coffee by the window.
tags: pottery mug,hand thrown mug,stoneware mug,blue grey glaze,handmade mug,artisan pottery,Connecticut craft

title: Hand-Thrown Pottery Mug - Sage Green with Speckled Finish
description: A wheel-thrown stoneware mug in a soft sage green glaze with a characteristic iron-speckle finish from the high-fire kiln. Approximately 14 oz — a good generous size. Cream unglazed ring on the base. Dishwasher and microwave safe. The sage green pairs beautifully with garden greens and morning light. A quiet, beautiful mug that improves with every use.
tags: pottery mug,sage green mug,hand thrown,stoneware,speckled glaze,artisan mug,handmade pottery

title: Hand-Thrown Pottery Mug - Warm Ochre with Dipped Rim
description: A cheerful wheel-thrown stoneware mug in warm ochre with a darker brown dipped rim and handle. Approximately 12 oz. Kiln-fired to cone 6. The contrast between the ochre body and the dark rim gives this mug a clean, artisan look. Dishwasher and microwave safe. A lovely everyday mug that feels considered and unhurried.
tags: pottery mug,ochre mug,hand thrown,stoneware,dipped rim,artisan mug,warm tones

title: Matching Mug Set (2) - Hand-Thrown Stoneware, Choose Your Glazes
description: A set of two hand-thrown stoneware mugs, each approximately 12 oz. Choose matching glazes or mix and match from our available colors: blue-grey, sage green, warm ochre, or classic cream. Specify your choices in the note at checkout. Kiln-fired to cone 6. Dishwasher and microwave safe. A thoughtful housewarming or anniversary gift. Arrives bubble-wrapped in a kraft box.
tags: mug set,pottery pair,hand thrown,stoneware mugs,choose glaze,gift set,artisan pottery

title: Letterpress Notecard Set - Wildflower Border, 8 Cards
description: A set of eight A2 letterpress notecards printed on 110 lb cotton paper. The border features a ring of hand-drawn wildflowers — echinacea, black-eyed Susan, and native ferns — printed with deep impression in a soft sage ink. Blank inside. Includes eight kraft envelopes. Perfect for thank-you notes, birthday greetings, or a thoughtful line to a friend. Printed in our Glastonbury studio.
tags: letterpress notecard,wildflower notecard,stationery set,cotton paper,handmade cards,botanical print,New England

title: Letterpress Notecard Set - Garden Hosta, 8 Cards
description: Eight A2 letterpress notecards printed on 110 lb cotton stock featuring a single bold hosta leaf printed in deep green with chartreuse veining. The print has that characteristic letterpress debossed texture you can feel with a fingertip. Blank inside. Comes with eight matching cream envelopes. A special card for garden lovers. Printed by hand on our tabletop press.
tags: letterpress notecard,hosta card,botanical stationery,garden notecard,cotton paper,handmade,plant lover gift

title: Letterpress Birthday Card - Oak & Acorn Design
description: A single A2 letterpress birthday card printed on deep-impression cotton paper. The design features a graceful oak branch with two acorns, printed in warm brown ink. Inside text reads: 'May this year be full of good light.' Blank on the reverse for your own message. Includes a kraft envelope. A dignified, beautiful card for someone who appreciates handmade things.

title: Letterpress Notecard Set - Native Fern Fronds, 6 Cards
description: Six A2 letterpress notecards printed on 110 lb cotton paper with an intricate native fern frond motif in deep forest green. Each card has a slightly different frond arrangement for variety. Blank inside. Includes six grey linen envelopes. A quiet, beautiful set for someone who loves the woodlands and understates things elegantly.

title: Pressed-Flower Notecard Set - Echinacea & Cosmos, 8 Cards
description: Eight A6 notecards each featuring a real pressed flower — echinacea petals, cosmos, and sweet alyssum — embedded under a clear acetate window on heavy ivory card stock. Each card is individual: the flowers vary naturally. Blank inside. Includes eight pearl-white envelopes. A truly beautiful set for someone who loves gardens. The flowers are pressed from our own Connecticut garden.

title: Pressed-Flower Framed Keepsake - Black-Eyed Susan Arrangement
description: A framed botanical keepsake featuring an arrangement of pressed black-eyed Susan, native ferns, and sweet alyssum on cream acid-free card stock. Housed in a 5x7 inch natural wood frame with glass front. Suitable for hanging or standing on a shelf. Each piece is unique — no two pressed arrangements are identical. Makes a lasting gift for a gardener or nature lover.

title: Pressed-Flower Bookmark Set - 4 Botanical Bookmarks
description: A set of four laminated botanical bookmarks each featuring real pressed flowers under durable matte laminate. The set includes: echinacea, cosmos, sweet alyssum, and native fern frond. Approximately 2 x 7 inches each, with a satin ribbon tassel. A beautiful, practical gift for any reader. These are pressed from flowers grown in our own Connecticut garden each summer.

title: Hand-Lettered Bookmark - Personalized Quote, Watercolor
description: A single hand-lettered watercolor bookmark with a short personalized quote or name of your choosing. Approximately 2 x 7 inches on 140 lb watercolor card with a hand-painted botanical border in soft greens and golds. Specify the quote or name (up to 40 characters) in the personalization field. Laminated for durability. Finished with a satin ribbon tassel. A deeply personal gift for a reader.

title: Hand-Lettered Book Plate Set - 12 Personalized Bookplates
description: A set of twelve hand-lettered bookplates printed in deep navy on adhesive-backed heavy stock. Each reads 'From the library of —' with the name of your choice printed by hand in our studio letterpress. Approximately 3 x 2 inches. A wonderful gift for the book lover who wants to mark their collection properly. Specify the name for the bookplates in the personalization field at checkout.

title: Reader's Companion Gift Set - Bookmarks, Notecards & Bookplates
description: A curated gift set for the devoted reader. Includes: 4 pressed-flower bookmarks, a set of 8 letterpress wildflower notecards, and 6 personalized bookplates. title: Custom Garden Gift Basket - Trug, Trowel, Pottery Mug & Notecards
description: A fully curated garden gift basket assembled to order: one monogrammed Sussex-style trug, one monogrammed trowel, one hand-thrown pottery mug in your choice of glaze, and a set of 8 letterpress wildflower notecards. Everything is handmade in our Connecticut studio. Specify the initial for the trug and trowel, and the mug glaze color (blue-grey, sage green, or ochre) in the notes at checkout. Arrives in a natural willow-handled basket with kraft tissue.
